x-source-note: Wire shape of every envelope emitted by the bru CLI in JSON mode. Every line of NDJSON from `bru run --json` matches this. One-shot commands (bru ls --json, bru get --json) emit a single instance.
title: Bruno CLI JSON envelope

version.description: JSON contract version. Bumps on breaking changes only.

kind.description: Identifies the schema of `data`. <noun>.<verb> for resource ops; <noun>.<phase> for events.

ok.description: False indicates a failure event or an error envelope.

data.description: kind-specific payload. Use bru schema cli-output --kind=<kind> for per-kind shapes (planned in a follow-up).

error.description: Present on stderr error envelopes (kind="error"). Absent on success envelopes.

code.description: Process exit code. Maps to EXIT_STATUS in @usebruno/cli.

name.description: Stable machine-readable slug for this error category. Branch on this, not on `message`.
